# artnet

`github.com/lnorton89/golc/internal/artnet`

Package artnet implements GOLC's Art-Net output layer (ARTN-01..ARTN-06,
CONTEXT D-03/D-04): a standalone daemon (daemon.go) owns the Worker,
fan-out target map, and pinned network interface for the lifetime of the
process and serves every CLI or UI client over the named-pipe transport
in internal/artnet/ipc -- no client ever constructs its own Worker or
output process. channelmap.go is the pure, in-memory transform from a
playback.Frame's semantic per-instance values into per-universe 512-byte
DMX buffers, with channel order always taken from a fixture Mode's
declared channel list, never from Capabilities' declaration order
(D-16/D-17). The daemon's own import graph reaches only playback, show,
and strictjson plus this package's ipc subpackage, so it runs entirely
headless and is reachable from internal/command without an import cycle.
